sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ حَسَّانُ سَائِقَ تَاكْسِي فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hassan radi kao vozač taksija u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan works as a taxi driver in the city.

sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ عَمَلَهُ فِي السَّابِعَةِ صَبَاحًا وَيَنْتَهِي فِي الثَّالِثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Počinje posao u sedam ujutro i završava u tri.
sentences.translationEn: He starts work at seven in the morning and finishes at three.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَدَّثُ مَعَ الرُّكَّابِ بِلُطْفٍ وَيُجِيبُ عَلَى أَسْئِلَتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Razgovara s putnicima ljubazno i odgovara na njihova pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: He talks to passengers kindly and answers their questions.

sentences.arabic: يَعْرِفُ شَوَارِعَ الْمَدِينَةِ جَيِّدًا وَيَصِلُ دَائِمًا فِي الْوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Dobro poznaje ulice grada i uvijek stiže na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: He knows the city streets well and always arrives on time.
